intro: Justicia refractifolia, also known as the Refract Flowering Justicia, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of J. refractifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
